title: Icons Compats
description: A resourcepack that adds Icons compatibility to mods.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3f92110ea4e8737944f2160ad73b83246a05582_0.webp) # This is a resourcepack that adds [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) compatibility for various mods so that they look prettier! As of [version v8.0](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-compats/version/8.0) this resourcepack also integrates with [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) so you can toggle every compatibility you want! # Compatibility List ### LEGENDS ✅ - Supported ❌ - Not Supported **Yet** ⬛ - Doesn't Exist | Icon | Mod Name | Music Discs | Armor Tooltips | Enchant Icons | Other | |------|----------|-------------|----------------|---------------|-------| | | [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | | | [Elysium Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/elysium-core) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | | | [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [End's Phantasm](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-phantasm) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Backported Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/backported-discs) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Pure Discs - Trails & Tales](https://modrinth.com/mod/purediscstrailstales) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Pure Discs - Tricky Trials](https://modrinth.com/mod/purediscstrickytrials) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) | ✅ | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [Happy Ghast Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/happy-ghast-legacy) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Snow Pig (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowpig-fabric) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae) | ✅ | ❌ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [The Graveyard (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [It Takes a Pillage Continuation](https://modrinth.com/mod/it-takes-a-pillage-continuation) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Bygone Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/bygone-nether) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Eternal Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-nether) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Gipples Galore](https://modrinth.com/mod/gipples-galore) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Snowy Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowy-spirit) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite) | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) | ⬛ | ✅ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [Simple Netherite Horse Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-netherite-horse-armor) | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | | | [Soul Fire'd](https://modrinth.com/mod/soul-fire-d) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [Vein Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/vein-mining) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [Guarding](https://modrinth.com/mod/guarding) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [Aileron](https://modrinth.com/mod/aileron) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [Nether Depths Upgrade](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-depths-upgrade) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [You're in Grave Danger](https://modrinth.com/mod/yigd) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [Chai's Elytra Enchants](https://modrinth.com/mod/chais-elytra-enchants) | ⬛ | ⬛ | ✅ | ⬛ | | | [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) | ✅ | ⬛ | ⬛ | ⬛ | # The mod you need compatibility for isn't there? **Open a suggestion on [GitHub](https://github.com/Fyoncle/Icons-Compats/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)!**
# ### Credits: - Some icons were taken from [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) with permission and modified to fit their modded counter-parts. - That incredible logo of Icons Compats is made by [Vixel](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel)!
